name: web-waifu-4
description: Local-first desktop, OBS, and Twitch VTuber assistant.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n overlay,ai -c cyan,magenta "cross-env BOT_PORT=8797 VITE_BOT_PORT=8797 VITE_DIRECT_TWITCH_CHAT=true VITE_STREAM_BOT_WS_ENABLED=false VITE_AI_PROXY_ENABLED=true vite --host 0.0.0.0" "cross-env BOT_PORT=8797 TWITCH_MOCK=true npm run dev:ai"
scripts.dev:overlay: cross-env BOT_PORT=8797 VITE_BOT_PORT=8797 VITE_DIRECT_TWITCH_CHAT=true VITE_STREAM_BOT_WS_ENABLED=false vite --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev:bot: cross-env BOT_PORT=8797 TWITCH_MOCK=true npm run dev:ai
scripts.dev:bot:irc: cross-env BOT_PORT=8797 TWITCH_MOCK=false npm run dev:ai
scripts.start:stream: concurrently -k -n overlay,ai -c cyan,magenta "cross-env OVERLAY_PORT=4173 BOT_PORT=8797 node serve-dist.mjs" "npm run start:bot"
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k -n overlay,ai,electron -c cyan,magenta,yellow "cross-env BOT_PORT=8797 VITE_BOT_PORT=8797 VITE_DIRECT_TWITCH_CHAT=true VITE_STREAM_BOT_WS_ENABLED=false VITE_AI_PROXY_ENABLED=true vite --host 127.0.0.1" "cross-env BOT_PORT=8797 TWITCH_MOCK=true npm run dev:ai" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173/ http://127.0.0.1:8797/health && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 ELECTRON_BACKEND_EXTERNAL=true ELECTRON_BOT_PORT=8797 electron electron/main.mjs"
scripts.desktop:dev:irc: concurrently -k -n overlay,ai,electron -c cyan,magenta,yellow "cross-env BOT_PORT=8797 VITE_BOT_PORT=8797 VITE_DIRECT_TWITCH_CHAT=true VITE_STREAM_BOT_WS_ENABLED=false VITE_AI_PROXY_ENABLED=true vite --host 127.0.0.1" "cross-env BOT_PORT=8797 TWITCH_MOCK=false npm run dev:ai" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173/ http://127.0.0.1:8797/health && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 ELECTRON_BACKEND_EXTERNAL=true ELECTRON_BOT_PORT=8797 electron electron/main.mjs"
scripts.desktop:start: npm run build && cross-env ELECTRON_BOT_PORT=8797 electron electron/main.mjs
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run build && npm run desktop:runtime && npm run desktop:clean && electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build && npm run desktop:runtime && npm run desktop:clean && electron-builder
